title: Google Profile (edit page) — pskastner
author: Peter S. Kastner
abstract: Webarchive capture of Peter S. Kastner's Google Profile edit page (2009). Documents Kastner's personal email pskastner@gmail.com, his Google Profiles URLs (vanity http://www.google.com/profiles/pskastner and numeric http://www.google.com/profiles/110552360138965462985), and Google's offers to add his Picasa Web Albums (pskastner) and YouTube channel (catalina588) to the profile. Personal archive only; no Aberdeen/Scott-Page content beyond implicit identity.
importance_rationale: Ephemeral personal-identity artifact useful for archive provenance and linking Kastner's various Google identities (gmail, Picasa, YouTube/catalina588).
relevance_rationale: Google Profiles itself was deprecated in 2011 in favor of Google+; the URL structure no longer resolves.
